---
id: crear-dispositivo
title: "Crear Dispositivo"
description: "Registrar una nueva instancia de WhatsApp."
sidebar_label: "Crear Dispositivo"
sidebar_position: 2
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: qr-devs/api/api-aplicacion/tenant/device/dispositivos
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Crear Dispositivo"}
></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/devices/create"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Registrar una nueva instancia de WhatsApp.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{
    required: true,
    content: {
      "application/json": {
        schema: {
          type: "object",
          required: ["app_name", "number"],
          properties: {
            app_name: {
              type: "string",
              description: "Nombre del dispositivo",
              example: "MiDispositivo",
            },
            number: {
              type: "string",
              description: "Número de teléfono",
              example: "51923456781",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "Éxito",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            properties: {
              message: {
                type: "string",
                example: "Dispositivo creado exitosamente",
              },
              data: {
                type: "object",
                properties: {
                  id: { type: "integer", example: 1 },
                  name: { type: "string", example: "Mi Dispositivo" },
                  phone: { type: "string", example: "51987654321" },
                  status: { type: "string", example: "connected" },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
